name: Senate Bean Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Dried White Beans, washed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover beans with water; bring to a boil and boil for 2 minutes. Remove from heat and cover pan; let it stand for 1 hour.
2. Drain beans and measure liquid. Add enough water to beans and liquid to make 3 quarts. Bring to a boil again and simmer covered, for 2 hours or until beans begin to mush.
3. Add remaining ingredients, except salt and pepper, and simmer, covered, for 1 more hour. Remove ham hock. Season to taste.
4. Makes about 2½ quarts
